demo.modal.static.header.text: HTML rendered server-side, loaded with the page.
demo.modal.dynamic.header.text: Content loaded via AJAX on request
demo.modal.tab.form.desc: Wraps body in a form tag
demo.modal.static.tab.agenda: The class allows you to create Bootstrap modals using an object
demo.modal.static.tab.note: Source code for this modal is available in the PHP / JS tabs above.
demo.modal.static.tab.js.code: A statically built modal does not require any JavaScript code. The modal is fully rendered server-side and controlled via Bootstrap data attributes.
demo.offcanvas.static.content.info: This offcanvas was created using the Opus\html\offcanvas\Offcanvas class with mostly default options.
demo.offcanvas.static.content.js: Offcanvas is statically built without any JavaScript code. Offcanvas is fully rendered server-side and controlled via Bootstrap data attributes.
demo.offcanvas.dynamic.content.info: This offcanvas was created using the Opus\html\offcanvas\Offcanvas class and loaded dynamically via AJAX using the OpusOffcanvas class.
demo.offcanvas.dynamic.content.js: A dynamically built offcanvas requires initializing an OpusOffcanvas object in JavaScript and calling the bindAjaxOffcanvas() method, which handles content loading via AJAX.
demo.offcanvas.tab.agenda: The class allows you to create Bootstrap offcanvas components using an object
demo.offcanvas.tab.note: Source code for this offcanvas is available in the PHP / JS tabs above.
demo.offcanvas.tab.size.desc: Responsive breakpoint: sm, md, lg, xl, xxl or null for always offcanvas
demo.offcanvas.tab.scrollable.desc: Enable body scrolling while offcanvas is open
demo.offcanvas.tab.static.desc: Static backdrop, won't close on click outside
demo.offcanvas.tab.shadow.desc: CSS shadow class, e.g. bs-opus-green-3d, false to disable
demo.offcanvas.tab.keyboard.desc: Close offcanvas on Escape key press
demo.offcanvas.tab.ajax.desc: Include alerts and loader elements for AJAX operations
demo.offcanvas.tab.form.desc: Wrap body and footer in a form element
demo.offcanvas.tab.headerClass.desc: CSS classes for header styling, e.g. offcanvas-header-opus-green bs-opus-green
demo.offcanvas.tab.headerText.desc: Header title text or Lang key
demo.collapse.static.content.info: This collapse was created using the Opus\html\collapse\Collapse class with mostly default options.
demo.collapse.dynamic.content.info: This collapse was created using the Opus\html\collapse\Collapse class and loaded dynamically via AJAX.
demo.collapse.static.content.js: A statically built collapse does not require any JavaScript code. The collapse is fully rendered server-side and controlled via Bootstrap data attributes.
demo.collapse.dynamic.content.js: A dynamically built collapse requires initializing the appropriate JavaScript object and handling content loading via AJAX.
demo.collapse.tab.agenda: The class allows you to create Bootstrap collapse components using an object
demo.collapse.tab.note: Source code for this collapse is available in the PHP tab above.
demo.collapse.tab.additionalClasses.desc: Additional CSS classes for the collapse container
demo.collapse.tab.ajax.desc: Include alerts and loader elements for AJAX operations
demo.collapse.tab.headerClasses.desc: CSS classes for header styling, e.g. collapse-header-opus collapse-header-opus-green
demo.collapse.tab.headerText.desc: Header title text or Lang key
demo.collapse.tab.additionalHeaderTextCl: Additional CSS classes for header text
demo.collapse.tab.buttonText.desc: Text or Lang key for the toggle button
demo.collapse.tab.buttonIcon.desc: Bootstrap icon class for the toggle button
